items.title: Google DeepMind (@GoogleDeepMind) / Posts / X
items.author: x.com
items.snippet: Google DeepMind and Google AI have been highly active on X (Twitter) in early 2026 with a series of major announcements. Most notably, Google DeepMind announced Gemini 3 Deep Think in February 2026, a specialized reasoning mode designed to push AI frontiers in science, research, and engineering, available to Ultra subscribers and select API researchers. Alongside this, Google AI announced Genie 3, a general-purpose world model capable of generating dynamic, interactive 3D environments from a sin

items.title: Gemini 3 Pro | Generative AI on Vertex AI | Google Cloud Documentation
items.author: docs.cloud.google.com
items.snippet: The Gemini API has seen significant updates heading into April 2026. Key model launches include Gemini 3 Pro (gemini-3-pro-preview, now redirecting to gemini-3.1-pro-preview after the original was shut down March 9), Gemini 3.1 Flash Live Preview for real-time audio-to-audio dialogue, and Gemini 3 Pro Image Preview. New capabilities include Computer Use tool support in gemini-3-pro-preview and gemini-3-flash-preview, Lyria 3 music generation (text/image → 48kHz stereo audio), and 4K output resol

items.title: Imagen 4 for Image Generation – Vertex AI Model Garden
items.author: console.cloud.google.com
items.snippet: Imagen 4 is Google's latest and highest-quality image generation model family, available through both the Gemini API (ai.google.dev) and Vertex AI (cloud.google.com). The model family includes three variants — Imagen 4 Ultra, Standard, and Fast — all generally available (GA). Key capabilities include text-to-image generation at 1K, 2K, and 4K resolutions, five configurable aspect ratios, and photorealistic output with sophisticated creative control. All generated images include a SynthID waterma

items.title: Google Antigravity
items.author: antigravity.google
items.snippet: Google Antigravity is Google's new agentic development platform, announced in late 2025 alongside Gemini 3. It combines a traditional AI-powered IDE (Editor View) with a Manager Surface for spawning and orchestrating multiple autonomous agents that can plan, execute, and verify complex tasks across the editor, terminal, and browser. Agents produce Artifacts — tangible deliverables like task lists, implementation plans, screenshots, and browser recordings — enabling developers to verify agent log

items.title: The Google Vibe Coding Stack: Build Full-Stack Apps With Nothing But a Prompt | by Kristopher Dunham | Mar, 2026 | Medium
items.author: medium.com
items.snippet: Google AI Studio has emerged as a prominent vibe coding platform in early 2026, enabling developers to build full-stack applications using nothing but natural language prompts. The platform supports a full-stack runtime environment with a React frontend and Node.js backend, automatic Firebase integration for Firestore database and Authentication, npm package support, and secure secrets management. The workflow allows users to describe an app idea, have Gemini generate the entire scaffold, then i
